name: Age Calculator
titleTag: Age Calculator - Calculate Age in Years, Days, and More | Smart Calculator Pro
metaDescription: Calculate your exact age in years, months, days, and even minutes. Free age calculator with detailed breakdown.
intro: Calculate your exact age in years, months, and days. Enter your birth date to see how long you've been alive and countdown to your next birthday.
shortDescription: Calculate exact age in years, months, and days.
longDescription: This calculator determines your precise age based on your birth date. It also shows your age in days and tells you how many days until your next birthday.
problemSolved: Helps users determine their exact age and next birthday.
whoItsFor: anyone wanting to know their age

inputs.label: Birth Day
inputs.explanation: The day of the month you were born.

formula.label: Age Calculation
formula.plainText: Age is calculated by finding the difference between the current date and the birth date.

formulaExplanation: Subtract the birth year from the current year
Adjust based on whether the birthday has occurred this year
Convert total age to months and days
methodologyNotes: This calculator accounts for leap years
Days until next birthday assumes this year's birthday hasn't occurred yet or next year's if it has
Time zone affects the exact day count for current calculations

example.scenario: Someone born on January 1, 1990, calculating their age on March 11, 2025.
example.resultSummary: This person is 35 years, 2 months, and 10 days old, having lived approximately 12,862 days.

resultInterpretation.defaultText: Your age represents the time elapsed since your birth. The days count shows the total number of days you've been alive.
warningMessages: For official age verification (like age-restricted services), use government-issued identification.
Time zones can affect exact day calculations by one day in some cases.

faq.question: How is age calculated?
faq.answer: Age is calculated by finding the difference between the current date and the birth date. Years are calculated first, then additional months, and finally remaining days are determined.

faq.question: How many days are in a year?
faq.answer: A standard year has 365 days, but a leap year has 366 days. Leap years occur every 4 years (except years divisible by 100 but not by 400).

faq.question: How do I calculate age on a specific date?
faq.answer: Subtract the birth date from the target date. Count full years first, then months, then remaining days to get a complete age breakdown.

disclaimer: This calculator provides age calculations based on the provided birth date. For official age verification, use government-issued identification.
